notableEvents.label: Yoán Moncada GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yoán Moncada grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Christian Walker. Jorge Soler out at 2nd. Yoán Moncada out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Logan O'Hoppe GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Logan O'Hoppe grounds into a double play, shortstop Carlos Correa to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Josh Lowe out at 2nd. Logan O'Hoppe out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel grounds into a double play, second baseman Jose Altuve to shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Christian Walker. Oswald Peraza scores. Zach Neto to 3rd. Mike Trout out at 2nd. Nolan Schanuel out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel grounds into a double play, second baseman Jose Altuve to shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Christian Walker. Oswald Peraza scores. Zach Neto to 3rd. Mike Trout out at 2nd. Nolan Schanuel out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Kai-Wei Teng. Zach Neto scores. Jorge Soler to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Christian Walker reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Yoán Moncada. Carlos Correa to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Jake Meyers reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Walbert Ureña.
